title: Techno-A-Thlon
subtitle: A multi-round technical challenge designed to test overall skills. Combining knowledge, logic, and practical problem-solving. Encouraging innovation and strategic thinking.
description:
Title of the Event: Techno-A-Thlon 
 Objective:The objective of this event was to test the overall capability of the participant in the tech field. It encompassed as many technical skills as possible, which brought a very holistic approach to the event. Tech-A-Thlon challenged participants to prove their technical might.
location: Bharati Vidyapeeth's College of Engineering, New Delhi
highlights: Quiz round to evaluate fundamental knowledge.
Multi-round technical competition testing overall skills.
Competitive environment fostering innovation and skill development
